How Often?

频率副词 · Frequency Adverbs

频率刻度 Frequency Scale
always
usually
often
sometimes
never
100% every time 0% not at all
🎶

How Often?

Frequency Adverbs · PAPILIO

0:00 0:00
🎤 Lyrics 歌词
Verse
I always wake up with the morning sun.
我每天迎着朝阳起床
I usually read before the day's begun.
清晨读书是我的好习惯
I often have rice lunch at school.
学校午饭常常吃米饭
I sometimes share my chips — so cool!
偶尔分享零食真好玩
I never sleep till all my homework's done.
作业做完才肯去睡觉
Chorus
Always, always — every day!
总是总是——每天都这样！
Sometimes, sometimes — okay okay!
有时有时——还不错嘛！
Never, never — no no no!
从不从不——绝对不行！
How often? Now you know!
多久一次？你现在知道啦！
Outro
Always — every day!
总是——每一天！
Never — no way!
从不——不可能！
Now you know — hooray! 🎉
你学会啦——耶！
✏️ Practice 练习

选择正确的频率副词，完成句子。
Choose the correct frequency adverb for each sentence.

I _____ wake up with the morning sun.
I _____ read before the day's begun.
I _____ have rice lunch at school.
I _____ share my chips with my friends.
I _____ sleep till all my homework's done.
0/5
Good try!
